name: Benh vien X - Quy trinh ve sinh tay (vi du tuy chinh)
description: Vi du: benh vien chinh file nay de them luat MA KHONG sua code/model. Ke thua 5 Moment WHO + them: rua tay toi thieu 10s, phai rua trong vong 60s truoc khi cham BN, va canh bao khi ty le tuan thu < 80%.

rules.name: Truoc khi cham benh nhan
rules.ok: Tay sach ngay truoc khi cham BN.
rules.bad: Tay khong sach truoc khi cham BN.

rules.name: Truoc thu thuat vo trung
rules.bad: Tay khong sach truoc thu thuat.

rules.name: Sau nguy co dich co the
rules.bad: Sau dich co the, tiep xuc ma chua ve sinh tay.

rules.name: Sau khi cham benh nhan
rules.bad: Sau khi cham BN, tiep xuc moi ma chua ve sinh tay.

rules.name: Sau khi cham moi truong quanh BN
rules.bad: Cham moi truong roi cham BN ma chua ve sinh tay.

rules.name: Rua tay toi thieu 10 giay
rules.bad: Rua tay chua du 10 giay theo quy dinh benh vien.

rules.name: Phai rua tay trong vong 60s truoc khi cham BN
rules.bad: Lan ve sinh tay gan nhat qua 60s truoc khi cham BN.

aggregate.name: Canh bao ty le tuan thu ca truc
aggregate.bad: Ty le tuan thu < 80% - can nhac nho/dao tao lai.

aggregate.name: Nhieu lan rua tay khong dat
aggregate.bad: Co >= 2 lan rua tay khong du thoi luong.
